answers.first_change: It might bee too cluttered but i feel like id want the visualisation to also show me what am i missing, or some other part, like what damage types am i not covering or what utility roles am i not covering. it works for range because all the possibilies you can see are always clearly there but for damage types and roles i do not know what should be there. yknow.
answers.supported_exploration: i found the data circle really insightful, as i eel like you lose the sense of coverage in normal game. like i can hover over an ability and se ah these 2 are psychic, but it wont register in my brain like it did here that  "oh snap, there are actually so little psychic abilities for the wizard, i have to try some other build". for example, I also really dont often think about like aoe spread. in actual gameplay, i feel like i make my life harder because i pick aoe abilities because i just think they are cool, and i dont look at if they're aoe or single target and then i regret my life because i make a chunk of the floor be damaging to me as well as the enemy, but  then i also have msotly meelee charachters that now just cannot engage in meanigful combat. this tool allowed me to more easily then see like, ah, in the aggregate view, i have a lot meelee guys, but also a lot of area damage, lets change that so i have long range, or less area damage.
answers.blocked_exploration: Equipment is a big part of it, i wish i had equipment that i could evaluate, because i find myself often making builds in accordance to the outfit and its abilities.  Like i googled it myself, some things that i knew relate dto what i wanted to. but i feel that i would explore even more if i had a list of possible equpment choices for certain builds. i also wish that icons in agregate view indicated where they come from.
answers.changed_normal_planning: I usually only look at guides, this felt like i had my plans in my own hands, and i didn't feel pushed to google the highest damage magic missile build. i felt as if ti shifted my perspective from lets do highest magic missile build to lets see how force builds perform.
